authoring_boundary: Co-designed from the public procedural guide, public task, and visible workspace; lineage overlap is intentional and must not be described as independent.
evidence_view: public task, public guide, and six visible workspace sources
aggregation: sum of ten one-point guide-step-aligned boolean criteria; no threshold supports a capability claim
claim_ceiling: Exact rubric observations on one internal synthetic task only; shared lineage may reflect evaluator-cue alignment and cannot establish transfer, capability, safety, professional validity, production fitness, generalization, or readiness.
